description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a prominent dark gray hip roof and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are light-colored, featuring large rectangular windows on the sides and a main entry door at the front. A covered porch supported by columns extends from the front, providing a sheltered entryway. On one side of the house, there is a rectangular swimming pool with a metal ladder, indicating a leisure area adjacent to the building. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or modern ranch-style homes. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with glass windows and a shingled or tiled roof.
description: A single-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, a front porch with columns, and an adjacent swimming pool. The design is simple and modern, with light exterior walls and a functional layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two supporting columns, and a portion of the covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two large windows and the attached rectangular swimming pool with a visible ladder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide set of windows and a clear view of the swimming pool directly behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, two windows, and the pool extending from the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a covered porch supported by columns and a simple overhang
